note: Mathlib/InformationTheory/Hamming.lean:41 defines hammingDist (and the Hamming type synonym, :210) -- the metric a Hamming code's minimum distance is measured in, but the file only builds the Hamming metric space, not the [n,k,d] linear-code construction of a Hamming code itself.

Top-level Mathlib folder (392 subfield entries with prefix Mathlib.Analysis. in catalog/data/hierarchy.json, e.g. Mathlib.Analysis.Calculus.*, Mathlib.Analysis.SpecialFunctions.*) is the formal home for real-variable analysis (limits, continuity, differentiation, series, measure/integration live under it); field-level container, not a single-object match.
